ocr_findings: Three terms 文 / 式 / 条件式 cleanly extracted with definitions. The two narrative example tables (1つの文を持つプログラム, 1+1, numと1が等しい) are intentionally absent from the leaves (cleaned-stage filter on illustrative inline tables — consistent with project convention).
Definition for 条件式: '計算結果が「真（正しい）」、または「偽（正しくない）」になる式' fully retained including the parenthetical glosses.
translation_findings: ZH 文→语句, 式→表达式, 条件式→条件表达式 — accepted CS terminology, glossary unique.
EN Statement / Expression / Conditional Expression — standard CS terms, faithful.

ZH '真（正确）/假（不正确）' + EN 'true (correct) / false (incorrect)' preserve the original parenthetical natural-language gloss (faithful to the textbook, even if 'correct/incorrect' is a non-standard CS rendering, it mirrors source intent for beginners). No choice markers.
